problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
